utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all seven. Each one is fully specified: destination (Budapest, Hungary), travel_dates (July 10–14, 2024), transportation (round-trip flights specified with cost 400), accommodation (hotel name, details, cost 400), activities (list of activities, cost 285), additional_services (detailed description and cost 840), and total_budget (1750). All details are covered and match the expected format completely.
